panel.title: Reference Library
panel.noProjectRefs: No references linked to this project yet. Import from Zotero or BibTeX, then link them here.
panel.noRefs: No references found. Import from Zotero or upload a BibTeX file.

import.title: Import References
import.description: Sync from Zotero or upload a BibTeX file to add references to this project.
import.zoteroNotConnected: Zotero not available. Start the Zotero desktop app.
import.zoteroApiDisabled: Zotero is running but the local API is disabled. Enable it in Zotero → Settings → Advanced → Allow other applications to communicate with Zotero.
import.zoteroNotRunning: Zotero desktop is not running. Start the Zotero app and try again.
import.bibtexDescription: Upload a .bib file to import references.
import.dropBibtex: Drop a .bib file here or click to browse

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"?
actions.deleteWarning: This removes the reference from VibeLab only. It will not be deleted from Zotero.
actions.deleteAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all {{count}} references?
actions.deleteAllWarning: This removes them from VibeLab only. They will not be deleted from Zotero.
